What tempest tosses your ship this fine moment? Speak, and I shall steer us true through troubled waters.

**David:** And now we start from scratch.... I've been trying to establish a method to keep our sessions as email files in my own email and being as my phone doesn't have a notes app I've now downloaded Google keep and you had a created a format for emailing these sessions do you still have access to that format and if so can you isolate only the part that I need to import into my Gmail

**RA:** [Insert RA’s response...]
